title: The Futures We Imagined
summary: Chapter 12 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Futures We Imagined. Theme: Young love imagines every impossible tomorrow.
sceneDescription: Imagined futures open into sky, plans, and young love reaching toward impossible tomorrows.
